rows.rationale: Pitch real-runtime shared join-negative scenarios verify not-connected, missing-federation, duplicate-name, already-joined, save-in-progress, restore-in-progress, FOM-open, FOM-read, and inconsistent-FOM failures, but the backend remains vendor-divergent for the invalid-time-factory family because the real Pitch join surface does not expose the Python-style local logical-time-factory override used by the reference backend to force that branch.
rows.recommended_next_action: investigate or isolate with focused vendor test

rows.rationale: A shared lost-federate MOM scenario now exists, the Python backend executes it directly, `pitch-py4j` has a gateway-process fault-injection wrapper, and `pitch-jpype` has a child-process probe path through the shared external-victim harness. The canonical `./tools/pitch lost-federate-probe` lane currently stops at preflight on this surface because Docker is unreachable and the required CRC/FedPro loopback ports are blocked, and earlier executed real-runtime Pitch probes still failed to produce observer-visible lost-federate evidence: the JPype path auto-resumed its dropped session and the Py4J path did not surface the report, so the family remains blocked.
rows.recommended_next_action: unblock capability or document the hard backend limitation

rows.rationale: verification_method=argument validation tests; Direct resign witnesses now prove invalid directives are rejected while each supported directive family drives its corresponding object-delete cancel-pending-acquisition or unconditional-divest outcome before membership teardown.
verification_method=argument validation tests; Direct connect lifecycle witness asserts the selected callback model is retained in backend state immediately after connect succeeds.
verification_method=argument validation tests; Direct connect lifecycle witness asserts the supplied local settings designator is retained in backend state immediately after connect succeeds.
verification_method=argument validation tests; Direct creation and duplicate-name witnesses now prove the federation execution name is consumed on both successful and rejected create paths.
verification_method=argument validation tests; Direct create witnesses now prove successful multi-module retention and rejection of missing unreadable or inconsistent FOM-module arguments.
verification_method=argument validation tests; Direct explicit-MIM witnesses now prove the requested MIM designator is consumed on success and rejected when it illegally names HLAstandardMIM.

verification_method=argument validation tests; Direct create witnesses now prove the backend accepts an explicit logical time implementation argument and otherwise selects the active logical time factory from the merged model rather than always defaulting to HLAfloat64Time.
verification_method=argument validation tests; Direct destroy witnesses now prove the target federation execution name is consumed on missing joined and successful destruction paths.
verification_method=argument validation tests; Direct join witness now proves the two-argument overload generates the backend-scoped federate name when no explicit federate name is supplied.
verification_method=argument validation tests; Direct join lifecycle witness asserts the supplied federate type is retained in the joined federate state.

verification_method=argument validation tests; Direct join witnesses now prove the supplied federation execution name binds the joiner to the target federation on success and is rejected when the target federation does not exist.

verification_method=argument validation tests; Direct join witnesses now prove accepted additional FOM modules are merged into federation state while unreadable or inconsistent additional modules are rejected.
